description: Back-of-head model shot showing a large pink/lavender tie-dye maxi scrunchie worn in a low ponytail. Clean warm background, excellent product clarity. Caption: Maxi scrunchie.

Split-image post: top half shows OR professional wearing white/green tropical leaf print surgical cap in real operating room context; bottom half is a branded graphic panel reading DISENO CON Proposito / El uniforme forma parte del trabajo / Los detalles hablan de ti with Wolf & Squirrel logo. Strong brand identity post.

Model facing camera wearing white surgical cap with pink piglet print (Gorra Cerditos) and matching pink/white gingham ruffled lanyard. SKU WS|GQ|TPP|001 visible. Clean product-forward shot with text overlay. Best for product listing.

Clean side-profile model shot against lavender background wearing light blue/sage floral leaf tie-back surgical cap (Gorra Celeste) with light gray/blue ruffled lanyard at collar. SKU WS|GQ|CE|001. Polished e-commerce quality. Best for product listing.

Lifestyle display arrangement draping multiple lanyards (rainbow tie-dye, green floral, heart print) and matching rainbow scrunchies over a wooden chair near a sunny window with floral curtains. Text overlay: LANYARDS HECHOS CON AMOR. Shows full product variety.

Clean side-profile model shot against lavender background wearing dark navy blue and white nautical quatrefoil tie-back surgical cap (Gorra Mapa Nautico). SKU WS|CL|MP|001, price $12000 CLP. Excellent e-commerce hero shot.

Back-of-head model shot showing black surgical cap with colorful Day of the Dead sugar skull (Catrina) pattern. SKU WS|GQ|CA|001, price $12000 CLP. Marked VENDIDA / sold out - flag as unavailable in shop.

Promotional banner/hero graphic: OR professionals wearing white/green tropical leaf surgical cap mid-procedure, overlaid with gold script VISUALIZA ESTO: El uniforme forma parte del trabajo and CTA DESCUBRE MAS. Phone: 941706533. Strong hero/banner candidate.

Customer mirror selfie in clinical consultation room (label AREA SUCIA visible). Healthcare professional in dark blazer wearing multicolor floral scrunchie in ponytail and pink/white ruffled lanyard. Authentic user-generated content - lower production value but high social proof.
